aggregate.name: aggregate
aggregate.recommended_next_step: pause this electrical topology behind the acoustic branch while testing a different electrical topology

netlists.name: f001_best_lockin_hybrid_p033
netlists.notes: Best prior p033 hybrid purity-lock-in row, re-instrumented before and after extraction.

netlists.name: f002_previous_hybrid_near_miss_h024
netlists.notes: Best previous h024 hybrid near-miss baseline.

netlists.name: f003_growth_preserving_hybrid_near_miss_h025
netlists.notes: Best previous h025 growth-preserving hybrid near-miss baseline.

netlists.name: f004_tuned_pure_varactor_extraction_pure_varactor_tuned
netlists.notes: Pure-varactor line using the same tuned 150 MHz extraction as p033.

netlists.name: f005_pure_varactor_no_extraction_pure_varactor_no_extraction
netlists.notes: Pure-varactor line with target extraction removed.

netlists.name: f006_pure_magnetic_same_extraction_pure_magnetic_same_extraction
netlists.notes: Pure magnetic-core nonlinearity proxy with fixed capacitors and the same extraction network.

netlists.name: f007_hybrid_no_extraction_hybrid_no_extraction
netlists.notes: Hybrid row with all target extraction and rejection filtering removed.

netlists.name: f008_generated_path_suppressed_generated_path_suppressed
netlists.notes: Hybrid line with the 50+50 to 100 MHz pathway intentionally weakened before target extraction.

netlists.name: f009_target_velocity_detuned_target_velocity_detuned
netlists.notes: Hybrid line with target phase velocity detuned while retaining extraction.

netlists.name: f010_phase_mismatched_line_phase_mismatched_line
netlists.notes: Hybrid line with deliberate generated and target phase mismatch.

netlists.name: f011_linear_fixed_component_extraction_linear_fixed_component_extraction
netlists.notes: Linear fixed-component line with the target extraction network still present.

netlists.name: direct_50plus100_reference_direct_50plus100_ceiling_reference_direct_reference
netlists.notes: Separated direct 50+100 MHz ceiling denominator only; not a discovery row.
